---
title: "test_phase_88_campaign_sync.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_phase_88_campaign_sync.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.63
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 6.20
overall_score: 5.71
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestCampaignSync, setUp. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [json](file://json)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.campaign_updater](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.campaign_updater)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.persistence)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models)

### Exports
- `TestCampaignSync`
- `setUp`
- `tearDown`
- `test_domination_gain_calculation`
- `test_no_double_processing`
